ChangeNotes.Value: v1.3.0 - Changing AI settings no longer needs a restart: backend, keys, models, endpoints and reply length all take effect on the very next reply, with a soft 'now speaking with...' notice confirming the swap. Letters now arrive like chats do: a portrait notice in the map's right-side stack, and clicking it opens the letter window on the writer's thread - no more popup blocking the map (dismissing loses nothing; the letter waits in the window, hotkey Y). Scouts finally see hideouts: the survey lists the dens of brigands your company has spotted, named by their band and counted as sharply as the scout's own eyes, and they can weigh a raid on a den same as against a warband or walls - unspotted dens stay honestly unknown. Plus a new Mod Options toggle to hide the on-map socialness stepper (asked for on Steam) - it folds away or returns the moment you tick the box, restart-free.
